semantic.role: ArchSpine CLI utility function generating formatted usage and audit reports from the manifest database.
responsibilities: Retrieves total usage statistics, summary breakdown, and active violations from the Manifest.
Formats and outputs a human-readable report to the runtime IO channel.
Handles empty data scenarios gracefully with appropriate messages.
Calculates and displays token counts and estimated costs.
outOfScope: Data persistence or modification of the manifest database.
invariants: Depends on the Manifest interface for data retrieval.
Depends on the RuntimeIO interface for output formatting.
Assumes the manifest database is accessible at the provided root directory.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a decoupled, reusable reporting function for CLI and other services to display usage and audit data.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of a broader refactor to modularize CLI and decouple core infrastructure services, as indicated by the git commit.

English.role: ArchSpine CLI utility function generating formatted usage and audit reports from the manifest database.
responsibilities: Retrieves total usage statistics, summary breakdown, and active violations from the Manifest.
Formats and outputs a human-readable report to the runtime IO channel.
Handles empty data scenarios gracefully with appropriate messages.
Calculates and displays token counts and estimated costs.
outOfScope: Data persistence or modification of the manifest database.

exports.name: runUsageReport
exports.signature:
runUsageReport(
  rootDir: string,
  runtimeIO: RuntimeIO = defaultRuntimeIO,
)
